assessment.note: She reports less overload but a still-fragmented calendar, signalling mild ongoing friction in focus and momentum; also implies a wellbeing issue worth covering next.

new_queue.label: Fragmented calendar
new_queue.name: Calendar is still fragmented — what's breaking it up most?
new_queue.description: Drills into the specific source of fragmentation so the friction is concrete and actionable.

new_queue.label: Opening pace check
new_queue.name: How's the last two weeks actually felt — energy-wise?
new_queue.description: Opener that invites a real answer rather than 'fine'. Reads wellbeing directly.

new_queue.label: Priority clarity
new_queue.name: What are you actually focused on this week, and why those things?
new_queue.description: Surfaces whether priorities are crisp or vague; whether they match what you thought.

new_queue.label: Visibility gap
new_queue.name: Where does your work feel least visible right now?
new_queue.description: Explores the specific places where strong execution is not translating into recognition or influence.

new_queue.label: Influence bottleneck
new_queue.name: What tends to slow decisions down when you need buy-in?
new_queue.description: Pinpoints the recurring dependency or interface problem that limits her influence.

new_queue.label: Manager support
new_queue.name: What do you want more of from me right now?
new_queue.description: Gets specific about the support Nina wants, whether that is decisions, air cover, introductions, or coaching.

new_queue.label: Next two weeks
new_queue.name: What would make the next two weeks feel steadier for you?
new_queue.description: Closes by turning the conversation into practical adjustments and support.
